content.en:
Ye Tian was not afraid of the fall of this copy body, but this copy body had the Immortal Armor that had just been refined, and if it was lost like this, it would be a big loss.

Besides, he really wanted to know the reason why Yandu Heavenly Pavilion was chasing and killing this third realm, maybe he could also get benefits from it!

"Senior, we might be able to sit down and talk. "

Ye Tian said again.

"Let's talk, don't you dare to help me?"

This Third Realm said coldly.

She was thinking about whether Ye Tian had summoned Yandu Tiange, and whether it was to delay time at the moment.

Ye Tian guessed the other party's thoughts, and immediately said: "In an extradimensional era, I will not reveal your whereabouts, I can make an oath, how about it?"

As he spoke, Ye Tian made an oath.

Seeing this, this third realm breathed a sigh of relief.

"You can call 'Eighty-Five-Zero' and call me the Lord of the Moon Realm!"

The third realm exists in the Moon Realm, and the Lord said.

Instantly, with a wave of his hand, the void transformed into a palace.

Ye Tian sat down with the other party to chat, and took out all kinds of extra-dimensional spirit fruits.

"Shangyue Realm Lord, I'm curious, why did Yandu Heavenly Pavilion want to hunt you down?" Ye Tian asked.

"Actually, it's not Yandu Tiange who wants to hunt me down!" the Lord of the Shangyue Realm shook his head, "Yandu Tiange is just a dog of the other party, what is Yandu Tiange, there are only eight third realms, if it's just Yandu Tiange, I can completely turn to other powerful forces, but I am not afraid of Yandu Tiange, what really wants to kill me is Yandu Tiange's backer, Blazing Yang Palace, Blazing Yang Palace is an existence with a fourth realm, and it also has two fourth realms." However, the two Fourth Realms of the Blazing Sun Palace went to a distant place and did not return for a long time. Even so, there were hundreds of them in the third realm of the Blazing Sun Palace. The Blazing Sun Palace is the real behemoth. "

"Blazing Yang Palace, two Fourth Realms, hundreds of Third Realms!"

Ye Tian gasped.

This is indeed a behemoth, you must know that there is no third realm in the Six Thousand Realms now, but the Blazing Sun Palace has hundreds of third realms, and there are two fourth realms.

It can be said that the Blazing Sun Palace casually dispatches a third realm, which is enough to sweep through the six thousand realms.

Even the Tricky Wood Red Dragon got out of trouble, and he didn't dare to scream in front of the Blazing Sun Palace!

"Are you scared?" the Moon Realm Lord sneered.

"I'm not afraid, I'm really afraid of you, the Lord of the Moon Realm, it's you who they're chasing and killing, not me!"

Ye Tian smiled.

The sneer of the Moon Realm Lord froze, indeed, it was she who offended the Blazing Yang Palace, not Ye Tian.

"Shangyue Realm Lord, what is the reason why the Blazing Sun Palace is chasing and killing you?" Ye Tian asked.

The Lord of the Moonlit Realm did not hide it, and directly revealed: "It's very simple, I have a treasure on my body that the Blazing Sun Palace needs-the Duowei Treasure Bottle, so the Blazing Sun Palace wants to kill me." However, the headquarters of the Blazing Yang Palace's forces is located in the 4000 Territory, and the Blazing Yang Palace has powerful enemies and regulations, so the Blazing Yang Palace cannot send a large number of Third Realms to hunt me down, so many forces under his command have come to find my traces, and Yandu Tiange is one of them. "

"Duowei Treasure Bottle!"

Ye Tian was excited.

Unexpectedly, the Lord of the Moon Realm actually had a real multi-dimensional treasure bottle on his body, no wonder even the Blazing Sun Palace wanted to kill her.

"Lord of the Moon Realm, you told me the secret of your possession of the Duowei Treasure Bottle so easily?"

Ye Tian was very surprised.

The Lord of the Moon Realm said: "You know that the Duowei Treasure Bottle is not a good thing, if you say it, the Fourth Realm will erase you and prevent you from leaking the news." Therefore, telling you will make you afraid to reveal my information. Even if you don't have an oath, if you tell Yandu Tiange now, Yandu Tiange will kill you. "

Ye Tian didn't refute, when it came to the Duowei Treasure Bottle, Yandu Heavenly Pavilion would definitely be killed.

Therefore, it was impossible for him to inform Yandu Tiange.

"It is used to improve cultivation!" "It would be good if it could be used to heal injuries, or it would be good to have the rules of improving the extradimensional dimension, but it was the most rubbish multidimensional treasure bottle used to improve cultivation." Moreover, I am now seriously injured and cannot hunt a large number of extradimensional creatures to condense multidimensional essences, nor can I use it!"

"A multi-dimensional treasure bottle for improving cultivation!"

Ye Tian showed interest.

It was just difficult for him to improve his cultivation right now, but if he had this multi-dimensional treasure bottle, he would be able to quickly improve his cultivation.

However, it was impossible for the Moon Realm Lord to give him the Duowei Treasure Bottle. []

Ye Tian pondered for a moment, and then said: "Shangyue Realm Lord, we can cooperate, I will hunt extradimensional creatures and hand it over to you, you condense the multidimensional essence and give me half of the multidimensional essence, how about it?"

"I can't use the Multidimensional Essence right now, why am I doing this, it's not good for me!"

The Moon Realm Lord rejected Ye Tian's proposal......

"What if I can guarantee that you won't be found by Yandu Heavenly Pavilion or even Blazing Yang Palace?" Ye Tian said.

"You can guarantee that I won't be ???found by the Blazing Yang Palace," the Moon Realm Lord sneered, "The Blazing Sun Palace has two Fourth Realm existences, that is, the other party can't come back now, once he can come back." With the background of the Blazing Sun Palace, there is no problem in borrowing a super-dimensional Dao soldier-level deduction treasure, and you can easily calculate my traces and find me. It's just that it will take some time for those two Fourth Realms to come back, but the Duowei Treasure Bottle is extremely precious, and those two Fourth Realms will definitely speed up and come back. Do you think you can obscure the deduction of the Fourth Realm?"

"I really can!"

Ye Tian was full of confidence.

"Are you sure?"

The Lord of the Moon Realm was a little skeptical.

At this moment, the lines of the Great Realm Armor Technique appeared on Ye Tian's body.

The Lord of the Shangyue Realm is the third realm, and his knowledge is naturally extraordinary, and he recognized the Great Realm Armor Technique at a glance, "This is the Third Layer Great Realm Armor Technique, how is this possible, even if it is the Heavenly Armor Clan, there are few who can practice the Third Layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique!"

"The third layer of the Great Realm Armor Technique, even the fourth realm can't calculate my traces, you can hide in the void in my body, with the shield of the Great Realm Armor Technique, the two fourth realms of the Blazing 0.5 Yang Palace have returned, and they can't count your traces. "

Ye Tian said.

"Indeed, there is a third-layer Great Realm Armor Technique, and the Blazing Sun Palace can't count any traces of me. "

The Lord of the Moon Realm was moved.

She pondered for a while, and finally agreed, "Okay, I promise to cooperate with you!"

"That's great!"

Ye Tian seemed to see the days when his cultivation continued to skyrocket, and it wouldn't be long before he could advance to the peak of the third realm.

But at this time, the Shangyue Realm Lord reminded: "You have to be careful, if you cultivate too quickly, the Transcendent Realm of the Six Thousand Territory will definitely feel wrong, and then Yandu Heavenly Pavilion will definitely guess that you are in contact with me, otherwise with the resources here, it will not be able to supply you to break through to the peak of the Second Realm in a short time!"

"I know, I have my own way!"

Ye Tian nodded and said.
